content.code:
# Worked focus: dsa-contiguous-layout — Explain indexing and cache-local traversal from contiguous logical storage.
def insertion_sort(values: list[int]) -> list[int]:
    result = values.copy()
    for end in range(1, len(result)):
        key = result[end]
        cursor = end - 1
        while cursor >= 0 and result[cursor] > key:
            result[cursor + 1] = result[cursor]
            cursor -= 1
        result[cursor + 1] = key
        assert result[: end + 1] == sorted(result[: end + 1])
    return result
